Localization.Description: Changes are pushed to a project

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} removed branch "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} pushed changes to tag "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created tag "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} pushed changes to branch "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to push changes to a project on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created branch "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Pushing changes to the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed tag "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
